meaning: adj.精通文学的,有学问的,有文化修养的
examples: Mental hospitals are filled with patients who have all of the properly lettered certificates.
Lettered words is an appropriate name.
And they all can be personalized, engraved, lettered or monogrammed.
The huge-lettered name on the lorries, EDDIE STOBART, the one that featured in all the pop songs and the jokes, wasn't even his.
